problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to they, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
